'''chafono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vaala|vaala]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vaala|vaala]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chafono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæfeneth|chæfeneth]] || [[word:chæfenej|chæfenej]] || [[word:chæfenesh|chæfenesh]] || [[word:chæfene|chæfene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafofonoth|chafofonoth]] || [[word:chafofonoj|chafofonoj]] || [[word:chafofonosh|chafofonosh]] || [[word:chafofono|chafofono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafonoth|chafonoth]] || [[word:chafonoj|chafonoj]] || [[word:chafonosh|chafonosh]] || [[word:chafono|chafono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafofnoth|chafofnoth]] || [[word:chafofnoj|chafofnoj]] || [[word:chafofnosh|chafofnosh]] || [[word:chafofnof|chafofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chafonotho|chafonotho]] || [[word:chafonojo|chafonojo]] || [[word:chafonosho|chafonosho]] || [[word:chafonoko|chafonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chafonoth|chafonoth]] || [[word:chafonoj|chafonoj]] || [[word:chafonosh|chafonosh]] || [[word:chafono|chafono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chafonothol|chafonothol]] || [[word:chafonojol|chafonojol]] || [[word:chafonoshol|chafonoshol]] || [[word:chafonokol|chafonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chafonothotho|chafonothotho]] || [[word:chafonojojo|chafonojojo]] || [[word:chafonoshosho|chafonoshosho]] || [[word:chafonoko|chafonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chafonothon|chafonothon]] || [[word:chafonojon|chafonojon]] || [[word:chafonoshon|chafonoshon]] || [[word:chafonokon|chafonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chafonothoro|chafonothoro]] || [[word:chafonojoro|chafonojoro]] || [[word:chafonoshoro|chafonoshoro]] || [[word:chafonokoro|chafonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
